title: /receive silently swallows get_diversifier_index DB error
description: wallet_store.get_diversifier_index(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT).await.unwrap_or(0) — if the DB query fails, the error is silently dropped and the command displays the address at index 0 as if nothing went wrong. The user sees a valid address (index 0 is always safe) but has no indication the DB read failed. Fix: match the Result and print a [wallet] error message on Err, identical to how /balance handles its error paths.
